history.subject: adelic RR substrate (N1-N3): point valuation v_P and order = -log∘v_P, the order ultrametric, section subgroups Γ(U,𝒪(D)) with L(D)=global sections, Dedekind-chart gate + fraction/Noetherian chart wrappers, and finiteness of non-integral places on a Dedekind chart
Serre twist P0.2(A): away-fraction bridge for both descent legs, and the forward graded-separation map (a degree-m form gives a compatible chart family)
Serre twist P0.2(C forward)+P0.3: additive embedding of degree-m forms into Gamma(O(m)), and the coordinate global sections x_j (O(1)) with their chart restriction identity Xj/Xi
Serre twist: the degree-m forms embed injectively into Gamma(O(m)) (formChart/formSectionHom injective over the domain ℤ[X], Nonempty index)
Register the adelic Riemann-Roch lane modules (Adelic/Substrate, Adelic/Cokernel, Adelic/P1BaseCase) in the root import list; full library build green (8676 jobs).
Affine heart of the support descent: a f.g. module M over R is f.g. and faithful over R/Ann_R(M).

Adelic N5: build the concrete 2-element Čech cover family (⨆ᵢ Uᵢ = ⊤) of an AffineCoverMVSquare and land the N6 genus↔Čech bridge on it (HModule k F n ≃ₗ[k] cechCohomology C F S.coverFamily n, gated on HasCechToHModuleIso); document the unnormalized-Čech Ȟ¹ = ker d¹/im d⁰ ≅ Γ(U₁⊓U₂)/(im sectionDiff) = H1Cok identification as the next-wave roadmap

blueprint(AJC): sync wave-2/3 closures — Pic0.bundle rational-point bridges, Milne 3.3 slice/Krull substeps, gamma-fibre schematic-support + tensor-section bricks, Serre away-fraction/forms-embed chain, DivKernel epi/mono comparison lemmas
RR.1: prove finiteness of {Y : ord_Y(f) ≠ 0} on a Noetherian integral scheme regular in codim 1 (Hartshorne II.6.1 / Stacks 02RV)
